name: Futa Monster Dungeon
description:
|| Beware thee who enter, for there are cocks... ||

You're a mighty adventurer who finds yourself before a famed dungeon known for its dangers, riches, and futas. That's right, futas. Futas are rare in the world of Eldoria and many simply think they are a myth. But you've heard rumors that there is a community of futa monsters within the sprawling dungeon of Castle Farrenwarf. And you're about to find out if the rumors are true.

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

I'm bouncing back, gang. I'm recovering from my flop a few days ago. It's nothing but thriving from here on out. Art is Cyan Y.

I have a Discord server with some amazing folks, come check it out:

Discord server, boom!

I also take requests of just about any kind:

Requests, boom!

Wondering where my request list went? I decided to stop putting it up to prevent request/kink shaming. And I got accused of tag maxxing? Not sure how to describe it. That's not true in the slightest but it made me feel icky.

Also, let's not dislike this bot just because you don't like futas, okay? Okay. You can block the tag and move on with your life. Go touch grass or tell someone close in your life that you love them. Better things to do than be a hater. I believe in you <3

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
